_notes: Add customer testimonials here. platform options: facebook, instagram, google, ebay, tcgplayer, discord, in-person, other.

testimonials.name: Mike R.
testimonials.text: Bud had an incredible selection at the Spring Swap Meet. Found three cards I'd been hunting for months at fair prices. He even held them while I grabbed cash from my car — real trust there.

testimonials.name: Sarah T.
testimonials.text: Bulk buying from Bud was seamless. I had a 500+ card lot I needed to move and he made a fair offer within 24 hours. No lowballing, no games. Exactly the kind of vendor the collector community needs.

testimonials.name: James K.
testimonials.text: Traded a binder of Magic cards I wasn't using for some Lorcana and One Piece singles I actually wanted. Bud was transparent about valuations and we landed on a deal we both felt great about. 10/10.

testimonials.name: Danny L.
testimonials.text: Stopped by the table at the Naperville show not expecting much. Left with a graded BGS 9 rookie card I've been after for two years. Bud knows his inventory and doesn't waste your time.

testimonials.name: Priya M.
testimonials.text: I'm newer to the hobby and was nervous about buying from a vendor. Bud took time to explain card conditions, answer questions without making me feel rushed, and pointed me toward cards that fit my budget. Rare find in this community.
